role: Core type definitions for the ArchSpine mirror system, covering protocol schemas and view output interfaces.
responsibility: Defines the canonical protocol types (configuration, indexes, manifests, rules, versions, language support) and all view data structures (public surface, risk hotspots, architecture diagrams, quality metadata), providing the foundational type contracts that ensure consistency across governance and visualization subsystems.

children.role: Defines the canonical protocol type schema for the ArchSpine mirror system, including interfaces for configuration, index documents, manifests, rules, versions, and language support.

Protocol type definitions re-export barrel file. Serves as the public entry point for all protocol type definitions, allowing external modules to import from a single location while keeping the implementation split across domain-specific files under src/types/protocol.
Central type definitions module for the View subsystem, defining data structures for all view output items including public surface, risk hotspots, architecture diagrams, and quality metadata.
